title: Advanced Scheduling (Optional)
impact: Evaluate and implement AdvancedPool for optimal task distribution

stepByStep: Identify use cases that would benefit from advanced scheduling
Consider: Is task affinity useful for repeated similar queries?
Consider: Would work stealing help for uneven task distributions?

tasks.description: Add task affinity for related searches
stepByStep: Create TaskAffinityRouter instance with the pool
Generate affinity key from search query (e.g., first few characters)
This routes similar queries to same worker for cache locality
acceptanceCriteria: Similar queries routed to same worker

stepByStep: Create benchmark comparing basic pool vs AdvancedPool
Test with various workloads (uniform, skewed, bursty)

successCriteria: Implemented if beneficial, documented if not
notes: This sprint is optional. AdvancedPool adds complexity and may not provide significant benefits for memory-mcp's use cases. The standard pool with FIFO scheduling may be sufficient. Evaluate before implementing.
